parameters.jsCode:
// Emit seed items for source_registry — each item becomes a row; keys become headers on first write.
const rows = [
  { source_id:'src_openai',       name:'OpenAI News',          url:'https://openai.com/news/rss.xml',                         type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.95, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_anthropic',    name:'Anthropic News',       url:'https://www.anthropic.com/news',                           type:'html', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.95, notes:'Official – HTML scrape' },
  { source_id:'src_google_ai',    name:'Google AI Blog',       url:'https://blog.google/technology/ai/rss/',                  type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.9,  notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_deepmind',     name:'Google DeepMind Blog', url:'https://deepmind.google/blog/rss.xml',                    type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',              trust_score:0.9,  notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_hf',           name:'Hugging Face Blog',    url:'https://huggingface.co/blog/feed.xml',                    type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',              trust_score:0.85, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_ms_ai',        name:'Microsoft AI Blog',    url:'https://blogs.microsoft.com/ai/feed/',                    type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',                trust_score:0.85, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_meta_ai',      name:'Meta AI Blog',         url:'https://ai.meta.com/blog/rss/',                           type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',              trust_score:0.85, notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_nvidia',       name:'NVIDIA Blog',          url:'https://blogs.nvidia.com/feed/',                          type:'rss',  tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',              trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Official' },
  { source_id:'src_mistral',      name:'Mistral AI News',      url:'https://mistral.ai/news/',                                type:'html', tier:'tier1', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai',              trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Official – HTML' },
  { source_id:'src_techcrunch_ai',name:'TechCrunch AI',        url:'https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/feed/', type:'rss',  tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',           trust_score:0.75, notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_venturebeat',  name:'VentureBeat AI',       url:'https://venturebeat.com/category/ai/feed/',               type:'rss',  tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'business_ai',                trust_score:0.75, notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_the_decoder',  name:'The Decoder',          url:'https://the-decoder.com/feed/',                           type:'rss',  tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.7,  notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_theverge_ai',  name:'The Verge AI',         url:'https://www.theverge.com/rss/ai-artificial-intelligence/index.xml', type:'rss',  tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.7,  notes:'Trusted media' },
  { source_id:'src_mit_tech',     name:'MIT Tech Review AI',   url:'https://www.technologyreview.com/feed/',                  type:'rss',  tier:'tier2', enabled:'true', topic_scope:'generative_ai|business_ai', trust_score:0.8,  notes:'Trusted media' }
];
return rows.map(r => ({ json: r }));
